pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency for production-ready features.
Add Spring Boot Data JPA dependency for ORM support.
Change H2 database dependency scope from runtime to test.
Remove scope from PostgreSQL dependency to make it compile/runtime default.
Upgrade SpotBugs Maven plugin version to 4.8.5.0.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to 0.8.12.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/booki.general_idea: Added Lombok dependency and annotation to reduce boilerplate code for constructor injection.
Added Spring Web annotations and domain imports to support REST controller functionality.
Removed TODO comment indicating the feature was previously unimplemented.
Implemented the BookingController with endpoints for creating, updating, and retrieving bookings.
Add Lombok @Data annotation to replace boilerplate getters, setters, equals, hashCode, and toString methods.
Add import for lombok.Data to resolve the annotation usage.
Add import for java.time.LocalDateTime to support new field types.
Add itemId field to the DTO to represent the booked item.
Add start field to the DTO to represent the booking start time.
Add end field to the DTO to represent the booking end time.
Remove TODO comment indicating the sprint task is now implemented.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.general_idea: Replace specific Spring annotations with a wildcard import to reduce boilerplate.
Add Lombok dependency usage to simplify constructor injection.
Add domain model and DTO imports required for the new controller logic.
Remove placeholder TODO comment as the feature is implemented.
Apply Lombok annotation to generate the final constructor for dependency injection.
Inject ItemService as a final field to enable Lombok constructor generation.
Implement POST endpoint for adding new items.
Implement PATCH endpoint for editing existing items.
Implement GET endpoint for retrieving a single item by ID.
Implement GET endpoint for retrieving all items owned by a user.
Implement GET endpoint for searching items by text.
Implement POST endpoint for adding comments to items.
Add Lombok @Data annotation to generate boilerplate methods for the DTO class.
Add final fields to the DTO to represent item properties.
Remove placeholder TODO comment from the class documentation.
Add JPA entity annotations and fields to the Item class to enable database persistence.
Add Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for getters, setters, and utility methods.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/reque.general_idea: Added Lombok @Data annotation to generate boilerplate methods.
Added id field to the entity.
Added description field to the entity.
Added requestor field to the entity.
Added created field to the entity.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/user/.general_idea: Added Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and dependency injection.
Added necessary imports for Spring MVC annotations, Lombok, and domain models.
Implemented REST controller endpoints for User CRUD operations.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate dialect configuration to allow auto-detection or use of a default dialect compatible with the target database.
Switch default database configuration from H2 in-memory to PostgreSQL for development/production environments.
Remove profile activation configuration that was likely used to isolate the H2 test configuration.
